mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cma_transactions (user_id, cma_account_id, currency, tx_type, source_type, amount, balance_after, ref_type, ref_id, idempotency_key, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{cmaAccountId}, #{currency}, #{txType}, #{sourceType}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{refType}, #{refId}, #{idempotencyKey}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, cma_account_id, currency, tx_type, source_type, amount, balance_after, ref_type, ref_id, idempotency_key, created_at FROM cma_transactions WHERE idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}

SELECT id, user_id, cma_account_id, currency, tx_type, source_type, amount, balance_after, ref_type, ref_id, idempotency_key, created_at FROM cma_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tx_type = 'COLLECT' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM cma_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tx_type = 'COLLECT' AND source_type = 'CARD' AND created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND created_at < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') + INTERVAL 1 MONTH

SELECT id, user_id, cma_account_id, currency, tx_type, source_type, amount, balance_after, ref_type, ref_id, idempotency_key, created_at FROM cma_transactions WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tx_type IN ('BUY_TRANSFER', 'SELL_RETURN', 'FX_IN', 'FX_OUT') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
